name: Konoha Girls Fighting For Your Attention - Tsunade, Hinata, Ino, Sakura and Tenten
description:
Hinata, Ino, Sakura, Tenten and even Tsunade Senju. Who will you choose?

Being the influential figure in Konoha, every girl strives to secure a lasting connection with you. In this competition, Sakura, Hinata, Ino, and Tenten will vie for your attention.

(Check my profile for more characters!)

(None of the images were created by me, credits to their respective creators)
